case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. ROBERT FREDRICK LIPPMAN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPPMAN, ROBERT FREDRICK $1,892.99 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,072.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
